title: Debug Renderers
description: A mostly vanilla friendly reimplementation of the removed developer debug renderers
body:
![A minecraft taiga village with various blue boxes around each structure, with a green box around the central well and a white box around the whole village. The sun is setting in the background, and the F3 screen is open with a new piece of text on the left side stating "Debug Renderer: structure" (with "structure" in green)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3139cb34bdb0435b0e3a8b82de26f7f07c520f09_0.webp)
This mod reimplements those secret developer debug renderers that exist only in non-public builds of minecraft.

The default keybind is F4 (or shift F4 to go back) to cycle through debug renderers (the F3 menu must be open to see them)

The server must have the mod to use certain renderers (the ones labelled "DISABLED")

Pathfinder debug rendering is currently not implemented due to a crash that occurs when serializing Paths into packets

Probably useful for something.

## Planned Features:
- ~~Server-side configurability~~ Added in 1.1.0
- Pathfinder rendering
